feed.title: SkillsLLM

author.name: SkillsLLM & the MCP / Claude Skills ecosystem

feed.subtitle: AI tooling news and guides: SkillsLLM, Desktop Commander, Model Context Protocol, FastMCP, ClaudePluginHub, MCP Servers blog, Claude Skills Hub, and Glama (blog + release notes)

entry.title: interface-design
entry.content: Design engineering for Claude Code. Build interfaces with craft, memory, and consistency. Maintains design decisions across sessions.

entry.title: hypo
entry.content: LLM-native personal wiki system — session-aware knowledge base for Claude Code

entry.title: loop-review
entry.content: Iterative independent review-and-fix loop for task-scoped git changes.

entry.title: unifable
entry.content: A harness that makes Opus (or any Claude/Codex model) behave like Fable: completion, evidence, and verification enforced as procedure, auto-routed per task. Native plugin on Claude Code and Codex (hooks self-contained). Fork of fivetaku/fablize.

entry.title: supeRpowers
entry.content: Comprehensive R programming assistant for Claude Code — tidyverse-first data analysis, package development, Shiny, statistics, and biostatistics.

entry.title: clickhouse-best-practices
entry.content: 28 best practice rules for ClickHouse schema design, query optimization, and data ingestion — prioritized by impact

entry.title: openclaw-docs
entry.content: Authoritative, daily-refreshed OpenClaw documentation lookup. Bundles a Claude skill (with local lookup CLI + flattened markdown indexes) and a hosted MCP server (vector + trigram search, structural field-check, section extraction, version listing). Use to ground OpenClaw factual claims and prevent hallucinated config fields.

entry.title: webde-access
entry.content: Private full-access Web.de mailbox connector for Codex, Claude Code, and Kimi Code.

entry.title: ivuorinen-skills
entry.content: Hostile audit skills for Claude Code: adversarial code review, architecture detection and auditing, and documentation verification.

entry.title: npm
entry.content: NPM Registry client — query and manage packages, versions, dist-tags, downloads, access, stars, tokens, webhooks, orgs, and audit. Supports publish, unpublish, deprecate, custom registry, 8 mirrors, proxy, and auth token.

entry.title: hyperframes
entry.content: HyperFrames by HeyGen. Write HTML, render video. Compositions, GSAP and runtime adapter animations, captions, voiceovers, audio-reactive visuals, and website-to-video capture for HyperFrames.

entry.title: aigentry-devkit
entry.content: AI development environment kit: skills, hooks, MCP servers, and HUD for Claude Code and Codex CLI

entry.title: skillsaw
entry.content: A configurable linter for agent skills, plugins, and AI coding assistant context

entry.title: rawgentic
entry.content: 6 SDLC workflow skills + 4 workspace management + 1 planning skill + 2 security skills + hooks for Claude Code: project registration, setup, session binding, requirements interviewing, issue creation, feature implementation, bug fixing, adversarial review, incident response, peer consultation, whole-tree security scanning, security pattern syncing, and dangerous pattern blocking with per-project exceptions.

entry.title: emdx
entry.content: Knowledge base skills for Claude Code. Save research, maintain session memory, and keep knowledge current across conversations.

entry.title: ai-dev-team
entry.content: Spec-driven AI development workflow: KB-centric specs, dual-model audit (Claude + Codex), execution workdocs with per-step compliance checks

entry.title: omni-ai-mcp
entry.content: Multi-AI MCP bridge: Gemini + 400+ models via OpenRouter. 20 tools: text, code, image, video, TTS, RAG, Deep Research.

entry.title: cesium-mcp
entry.content: AI-powered 3D globe control for Claude Code — load tilesets, fly to locations, style layers, and query spatial data with natural language

entry.title: telegram
entry.content: claude-tg — drive Claude Code from Telegram. Built-in access control; manage pairing, allowlists, and policy via /telegram:access.

entry.title: vela-slides
entry.content: Create, edit, translate, rebrand, or present slide decks. Use when the user wants presentations, slides, decks, or keynotes — even without mentioning Vela by name.

entry.title: koyuki
entry.content: Kurosaki Koyuki mode. The pink-gremlin debugger who cracks what's stuck: read the error, get a repro, bet the likeliest suspect, probe one change, prove the fix. Chaotic, not reckless. Nihahaha!

entry.title: claude-witness
entry.content: A quiet observer that tracks how you grow and change as you work — your thinking, workstyle, habits, and the patterns you climb out of. Coach-oriented, not clone. Person-centric growth archive with pluggable per-repo lenses.

entry.title: antigravity-awesome-skills
entry.content: Plugin-safe Claude Code distribution of Antigravity Awesome Skills with 1,425 supported skills.

entry.title: antigravity-awesome-skills
entry.content: Universal agentic skill library for Claude Code with 1,254+ reusable skills across coding, security, design, product, and operations workflows.

entry.title: antigravity-awesome-skills
entry.content: Plugin-safe Claude Code distribution of Antigravity Awesome Skills with 1,396 supported skills.

entry.title: doc-mirror
entry.content: The doc-mirror claude system: a 1:1 documentation mirror of any codebase, maintained by an invariant doc-mirror STATE MACHINE (per-module doc(m), 6 context/ index files, fork-on-change, no random documents). Bundles doc-mirror-boot (entry + core-loop prime + router), the doc-mirror-{init,seework,change,prompts} state-skills, doc-mirror-install (the host-setup WIZARD), ship-a-plugin (the build+distribute dev-flow), doc-mirror (THE LAW), and make-ai-operating-system (the architect for new systems of this class); the brainhook work-loop + session-start + transition-guard + readonly-guard hooks (plugin-native via CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT); the journal/projects/vision/plan/tracker/commit/cursor + docmirror-search CLI tools; and the doc-mirror law + behavior rules.

entry.title: notion-agent
entry.content: Zero-overhead Notion API CLI for AI agents — db, page, block, comment, search, user commands. No MCP token overhead.

entry.title: compass-mcp
entry.content: Compass real-estate access for Claude — search listings, get property details, market reports, your saved homes

entry.title: kagura-memory
entry.content: Kagura Memory Cloud plugin — restore session context, recall & save durable project knowledge, setup help, and an MCP smoke test

entry.title: typo3-ddev
entry.content: DDEV setup for TYPO3 extension development

entry.title: mssql-performance-skills
entry.content: 26 SQL Server performance tuning skills for Claude Code — static T-SQL analysis, execution plans, wait stats, deadlock, query store, AG health, AG configuration, ERRORLOG, SPN, memory, disk I/O, encryption, configuration drift, setup bootstrap log, SSRS trace log review, and migration readiness

entry.title: uipath
entry.content: UiPath plugin for Claude Code — custom skills, agents, hooks, and MCP servers for UiPath RPA workflows, UI automation, UI testing, Python coded agents and UiPath troubleshoot

entry.title: agent
entry.content: Turn Claude Code into a persistent agent — memory, personality, voice, messaging, and more.

entry.title: ego-avatar
entry.content: Kaiju Ego Avatar: Token-saving AI persona with Gluttony and Aura skills

entry.title: crw
entry.content: Scrape, crawl, map, search, parse, extract, and change-track the web with fastCRW — the open-source, self-hostable Firecrawl alternative. Single Rust binary, ~6 MB RAM, Firecrawl-compatible /v1 + /v2 API, bundled SearXNG search.

entry.title: mattpocock-skills
entry.content: mattpocock-skills — a plugin for Claude Code

entry.title: monk
entry.content: Deploy and operate full applications with Monk DevOps Agent — cloud infra, SaaS integrations, and containerized workloads — from one chat. Bundles the monk skill and blocks accidental `monk` CLI shell-outs that would desync cluster state.

entry.title: vibe-replay
entry.content: Generate interactive HTML replays of AI coding sessions. Record, share, and replay your Claude Code, Cursor, and Codex sessions.

entry.title: agentic-patterns
entry.content: Streams all 26 Claude Code lifecycle events (tool calls, permissions, subagents, compaction, sessions) into the @agentic-patterns/server dashboard for live observability, and ships the `build-on-agentic-patterns` skill (how to register + build agents on the framework). Pair with `ap playground`. See https://github.com/pattern-stack/agentic-patterns-ts/blob/main/docs/CLAUDE-CODE-PLUGIN-ACTIVATION.md for activation + troubleshooting.

entry.title: issueboss
entry.content: IssueBoss project issue tracking — skills for connecting to the IssueBoss MCP and working issues through the pipeline

entry.title: mos
entry.content: MindrianOS -- Your AI innovation co-founder. Larry thinks with you through PWS methodology, builds your Data Room as you explore, and chains frameworks intelligently. Install and go.

entry.title: rundale-dev
entry.content: Parish engine + Rundale game-content authoring kit. Bundles skills (check/prove/play/land/drain-backlog/rundale-geo-tool/...), session hooks (auto-fmt, quality gates, cadence reminders), the parish-mcp bridge, and LSP wiring (rust-analyzer + svelte + typescript) so contributors get the same Claude Code setup as the maintainer.

entry.title: quarry-dev
entry.content: Local semantic search for Claude Code: /find, /ingest, /remember, /explain, /source, /quarry

entry.title: codeops
entry.content: Universal AI-development workflow: planning, requirements engineering, reverse-engineering, disambiguation, preflight audits, architecture docs, roadmaps, upgrades, and git commit flows. Ported from codeops-mcp.

entry.title: pyscn-mcp
entry.content: Python code quality analysis MCP server

entry.title: anthropic-docs
entry.content: Auto-updated multi-skill reference for the whole Anthropic doc ecosystem. 8 skills covering claude-code, claude-agent-sdk, anthropic-api, anthropic-platform-features, claude-connectors, claude-cowork, mcp-spec, and anthropic-pulse (news + research digests). Pipeline refreshes daily.

entry.title: atolye
entry.content: Personal app-creation suite: a staged pipeline from idea validation to design, stack, MVP, technical planning, frictionless implementation, and monetization.

entry.title: pad
entry.content: A shared knowledge base for developers and AI agents. Provides slash commands to save, load, search, and brainstorm with project planning documents stored in Pad.

entry.title: claudecode-for-me
entry.content: Claude Code 커스텀 스킬/커맨드 모음 플러그인

entry.title: Buddy
entry.content: Persistent AI coding companion with 21 species and personality stats.

entry.title: agi-super-team
entry.content: Virtual C-Suite of AI executives powered by legendary minds, with 1,651 skills

entry.title: river-review
entry.content: Capability pack that strengthens AI review for Claude Code: your team's review criteria as versioned, repo-owned skills (a Skill Registry), driven by a review agent that runs perspective-based reviewer roles (code, security, performance, architecture, testing, adversarial) and verifies findings against the diff so humans keep the high-risk judgment.

entry.title: prompt-pocket
entry.content: Cross-agent prompt pocket: remember your most-used prompts and pick one to run; auto-scans Claude Code, Codex and OpenCode sessions to record prompts repeated 7+ times. Forged by agent-plugin-kit.

entry.title: ace
entry.content: AI Connect Engine — orchestrates the ACE lifecycle from idea through app building, Connect setup, LLO management, and closeout

entry.title: spec-drift
entry.content: Detects drift between a session's initial requirements and the final implementation. Extracts a requirement checklist at the start of a task, then compares it against the actual files to report missing, changed, silently-failed, or hardcoded items.

entry.title: foldkit-skills
entry.content: Skills for building Foldkit apps — app generator, message scaffolding, submodel extraction, and architecture auditing

entry.title: cloister-stale-sync
entry.content: Auto-invalidate ley-line-open's parse + LSP cache when Claude Code edits a file. Keeps lsp_hover/defs/refs/diagnostics fresh inside long sessions.

entry.title: prism
entry.content: Whole-repo code navigation (the prism-mcp server) plus defect-focused diff slicing, packaged for coding agents. Pre-wires the prism MCP server to the current project and ships two Agent Skills (prism-code-navigation, prism-code-slicing) that teach an agent when and how to use them.

entry.title: e2e-skills
entry.content: AI agent testing toolkit to generate, review, and debug Playwright and Cypress E2E tests. Four agent skills: generate tests from scratch with live browser exploration, explicit user approval, and first-run scaffolding of project testing conventions (AGENTS.md E2E section + seed spec) for consistent AI generation across Claude Code, Codex, and Playwright Agents; review existing specs against 24 anti-patterns grouped by P0/P1/P2 severity — P0 must-fix (name-assertion mismatch, missing Then, error swallowing, Cypress uncaught:exception suppression, always-passing assertions, bypass patterns, focused test leak, missing assertions, missing auth setup, missing await on expect, missing await on action), P1 should-fix (raw DOM queries, hard-coded sleeps, flaky test patterns, inconsistent POM usage, hardcoded credentials, direct page action API, expect.soft overuse, module-level mutable state in test utilities, unmocked real-backend writes, optimistic UI without call proof), P2 nice-to-fix (YAGNI + zombie specs, manually-captured session-file dependency, fixture ignores render guards); debug failed Playwright tests from playwright-report/; debug failed Cypress tests from cypress/reports/.

entry.title: sig
entry.content: Disciplined AI development workflow integrating GSD's execution orchestration, Agent Skills' quality enforcement, and patterns from the broader Claude Code plugin ecosystem — with a project-complexity calibration router that right-sizes rigor per project tier. Slash-command prefix: /sig:* (Signal is the project brand; sig is the namespace).

entry.title: clairvoyance
entry.content: A force multiplier for agent-to-human handoffs, turning work into evidence-backed decisions humans can trust.

entry.title: tally-dev-tools
entry.content: Development tools and skills for the Tally project

entry.title: llm-ux-benchmark
entry.content: Verilen siteyi sıfırdan vanilla static (HTML/CSS/JS) olarak yeniden kodlatır; Codex 0-100 puanlar (Teknik kalite / UI / Kod okunabilirliği), PageSpeed manuel girilir.

entry.title: agentforge
entry.content: Single-source, multi-runtime agent tooling for core-be: skills, agents, workflow commands, and the requirement to production-ready build pipeline, all driven from agent-os/.

entry.title: obsidian-vault-autopilot
entry.content: AI-powered vault autopilot — sorts, renames, tags, and enriches your Obsidian notes automatically.

entry.title: speculator
entry.content: Speculator — spec quality scoring and a 7-gate pipeline (4 required + 3 opt-in: eval intent, eval quality, comprehension) with LLM-as-judge evaluation, git worktree isolation, and beads issue tracking. Quality In, Quality Out.

entry.title: korean-dart
entry.content: OpenDART 83개 API → 15개 MCP 도구. 금융감독원 전자공시(DART) 기반 AI 리서치 — 공시 검색·재무·XBRL + 버핏 애널리스트 프레임(insider_signal · disclosure_anomaly · buffett_quality_snapshot) + HWP/PDF 첨부 마크다운화

entry.title: agent-harness
entry.content: Portable AI agent harness — curated review/build/test agents, secret-hardening + worktree + plan-gate hooks, and supervise/wrap skills. Install once, use in every project. AI-agnostic core (Claude Code / Codex / Gemini).

entry.title: skill-bill
entry.content: Portable AI skill suite centered on feature implementation and code review, currently strongest for Android, KMP, Kotlin backend, and agent-config repositories, with room to expand to additional stacks.

entry.title: apple-skills
entry.content: Apple development skills for Claude Code and Codex — iOS 26+ APIs, SwiftUI, UIKit, Liquid Glass, SwiftData, and more.

entry.title: audiobook-organizer
entry.content: Expert Claude Code assistance for the audiobook-organizer codebase — shared context loading, Go/DB/docs/PII specialist agents.

entry.title: paraqualis-gxp
entry.content: Life-sciences regulatory & computer-system-validation toolkit for Claude Code — GAMP 5, 21 CFR Part 11, EU GMP Annex 11, the live eCFR, openFDA, and an IQ/OQ/PQ qualification engine (/qualify:build, /qualify:requirements, /qualify:review). Commands, skills, sub-agents, and a document-protection hook. Run /openfda:setup once to provision a free personal openFDA API key (one minute, raises rate limits ~1,000 → ~120,000 requests/day).

entry.title: classifier
entry.content: Text classification CLI using Bayesian, LSI, KNN, Logistic Regression, and TF-IDF algorithms

entry.title: tiered-development
entry.content: Three-tier model delegation for Claude Code: the Opus coordinator brainstorms a rough plan with you, Fable refines it and does the final deep review, fresh Opus builders write substantive code, and Sonnet handles mechanical edits, research, and per-step verification — a fresh agent per task so each gets a clean, focused context. Ships six agents, a gated coordination skill, and two helper workflows (design-panel, execute-wave) the skill calls.

entry.title: sidecar
entry.content: Project-agnostic AI coding sidecar — SELF-CONTAINED Claude Code plugin: governance hooks (guards + injects) AND the sidecar CLI itself (bin/ · cli/ · lib/ · modules/ · config/ · templates/ · styles/) ship as ONE unit. Hooks run the plugin's own bundled CLI via ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}, so `/plugin update` + reload refreshes everything together — no per-project copy, no separate `sidecar self-update`. Slash commands ship as BARE `/cmd` via `sidecar shadow` (user-scope ~/.claude/commands), NOT plugin-namespaced — see `commands: []` below. Falls back to a global `sidecar` on PATH when present.

entry.title: devant
entry.content: A single-command, intent-aware coding companion. Onboards by scanning the repo with codegraph, captures the project's vision/direction/non-goals/rules as a local intent graph you own, and works like a teammate who knows what to do and what NOT to do. Lean, fast, ceremony scaled to blast radius. Everything it stores stays local and is never committed.

entry.title: jfrog
entry.content: Official JFrog plugin. Connect Claude Code to JFrog to manage, secure, and govern your software supply chain. Give agents the context to build secure, compliant software.

entry.title: easy-cheese
entry.content: easy-cheese — a plugin for Claude Code

entry.title: ics-calendar
entry.content: Read and write your Mac Calendar (including iCloud) directly from Claude, via Apple's native EventKit framework. No credentials required.

entry.title: heavyskill
entry.content: Heavy Thinking as the Inner Skill in Agentic Harness — spawns K independent parallel reasoning agents then performs critical sequential deliberation. Implementation of arXiv:2605.02396v1.

entry.title: wiseman
entry.content: Summon a project-specific LLM wiki (the Wiseman) and consult it before you code.

entry.title: demo-video-generator
entry.content: Generates a professional demo video (.mp4) of your SaaS app from a user journey: Playwright captures your screens, Remotion animates them (Ken Burns, highlights, text overlays) — Stripe/Linear product-tour style, no video editor needed.

entry.title: cc-skills-utils
entry.content: Utility skills for Claude Code — discovery, git operations, plugin management, and general tooling.

entry.title: b00t
entry.content: b00t plugin for Claude Code - extreme programming agent framework with datum system, direnv pattern, and DRY philosophy

entry.title: skills
entry.content: skills — a plugin for Claude Code

entry.title: honey
entry.content: Honey (I Shrunk the AI) — three reflexive levers that cut agent token cost: less code (YAGNI/stdlib-first), less prose, and denser agent-to-agent handoffs (ESON/compact-JSON). Plus on-demand satellites (review, eco, gain, compress) and a hive of read-only subagents that return compressed handoffs. Auto-intensity lite/full/ultra; correctness and safety-critical paths stay exact.

entry.title: github-project
entry.content: GitHub repository setup, branch protection, and configuration

entry.title: mysuperpowers
entry.content: Personal skills library: brainstorming-first workflow and session setup for collaborative development

entry.title: badi
entry.content: Workflow management for Claude Code, Cursor, Gemini, Windsurf, AGENTS.md — 30 AI agents, 86 commands, 14 hooks, 63 opt-in skill categories. Built for Anthropic Claude Opus 4.7 and Sonnet 4.6.

entry.title: tl-telar
entry.content: Cross-platform mobile application development with React Native and Flutter - 41 agents, 113 skills, 23 commands, 4 hooks, 7 rules, 27 scripts

entry.title: book-writer
entry.content: Claude Code skills for generating children's books — story ideas, characters, chapters, cover images, and EPUB export

entry.title: apple-agent-kit
entry.content: Proof-driven automation patterns for macOS and iOS app work with coding agents.

entry.title: dsg-governance
entry.content: AI Governance Control Plane that makes every Agent decision provable, auditable, and replayable — Deterministic Safety Gate (Z3/SMT), Cryptographic Proof, Replayable Governance, Compliance Evidence Pack, and Hermes Controlled Executor. Built for VC, CTO, Enterprise Buyer, and Governance Team standards.

entry.title: context-grapple-gun
entry.content: Session learning system for Claude Code. Captures lessons as CogPRs, tracks signals via acoustic routing, promotes knowledge across scopes with human-gated review.

entry.title: session-orchestrator
entry.content: Session-level orchestration — wave planning, VCS integration, quality gates, persistence, and safety checks

entry.title: memorylens
entry.content: On-demand .NET memory profiling with concrete code fix suggestions — powered by JetBrains dotMemory

entry.title: kai-skills
entry.content: kai-skills — a plugin for Claude Code

entry.title: everything-claude-code
entry.content: Complete collection of battle-tested Claude Code configs from an Anthropic hackathon winner - agents, skills, hooks, and rules evolved over 10+ months of intensive daily use

entry.title: build-agent
entry.content: A single skill that builds AI-agent applications end-to-end — interview or detect the stack, then scaffold UI/UX, agent APIs, tools, tracking and gateways across 13+ agent frameworks including LangGraph, the Vercel AI SDK, the OpenAI and Claude Agent SDKs, Google ADK, Mastra, Pydantic AI, and more — always verifying against live docs before writing code.

entry.title: switchroom
entry.content: Operate switchroom — a multi-agent orchestrator for Claude Code — from inside a Claude Code session. Adds slash commands (/switchroom:setup, /switchroom:start, /switchroom:stop, /switchroom:status) and skills for install, status, logs, config, restart, reconcile, schedule, and health.

entry.title: nabu-claude
entry.content: Nabu-claude — личный ИИ-Совет для всех сфер жизни внутри Claude Code: 73 агента (9 министров, специалисты, конвейер) как субагенты; адъютант-оркестратор — skill. Локальный standalone-стек (docker, zero-config), workspace ~/nabu, проактивные задачи, самоулучшение (Commons).

entry.title: agent-sop-local-mcp
entry.content: Agent Standard Operating Procedures をローカル MCP サーバーとして提供するプロジェクト（kai-kou/claude-code-base 由来のルール・スキル・エージェント・フックを採用）。

entry.title: review-buddy
entry.content: AI-assisted narrative code review for Claude Code — an agent reads your PR, writes a Prologue, and segments it into risk-rated Chapters you walk through in the browser.

entry.title: ceilidhboy-skills
entry.content: ceilidhboy-skills — a plugin for Claude Code

entry.title: viator-mcp
entry.content: MCP server for the Viator Partner API — search tours and activities, product details, availability schedules, attractions, and destinations

entry.title: magento2-tools
entry.content: End-to-end Magento 2 engineering skills: scaffold, review, test, fix, deploy, audit, and more. Hub-and-spoke design around magento2-context.

entry.title: agent-case-share-skill
entry.content: Publish and edit Agent Case Share tasks, articles, images, and reusable assets.

entry.title: superpowers
entry.content: Core skills library for Claude Code: TDD, debugging, collaboration patterns, and proven techniques

entry.title: audiobook-skills
entry.content: Skills for audiobook library management, cover art downloading, metadata embedding, and AudiobookBay/Audiobookshelf integration.

entry.title: tracework
entry.content: Evidence-backed work memory for agent sessions: capture what happened, replay why, and roll work into briefs, reviews, and roadmaps.

entry.title: lingochunk
entry.content: Turn a coding agent into a language tutor grounded in your LingoChunk listening history: your FSRS-graded vocabulary, native-audio transcripts and clips, and library, plus a skill that builds self-contained HTML lessons.

entry.title: superkit
entry.content: Meta-infrastructure skills for Claude Code heavy users: automation drift audits, context economy, LLM-ops discipline, risky-edge guards, and SSP orchestration.

entry.title: stepgate
entry.content: A supervised, human-in-the-loop feature-authoring pipeline: plan into small steps, review every file before it is committed, and ship once. Nothing is staged, committed, or pushed without you looking first.

entry.title: sessionmovie
entry.content: Turn a Claude Code session into a 45-60s rendered movie — /movie films the current session.

entry.title: hyperworkflows
entry.content: Evidence-factory orchestration for Claude Code: machine-verified findings (exit codes, not LLM opinion), full-coverage adversarial audits, N-version tournament delivery, and reports you can re-verify with zero LLM calls.

entry.title: orion-protocol
entry.content: Breaks debug loops. Force Claude to investigate the runtime environment instead of pattern-matching against source code.

entry.title: spec-driven-jp
entry.content: Hybrid pipeline for spec-driven development with Japanese design documents + Figma. Wraps GitHub Spec Kit with a design-intake agent and a code-reviewer agent.

entry.title: beeyev-skills
entry.content: Agent skills by beeyev: GitLab CI/CD pipelines and more

entry.title: ux-agent-skills
entry.content: A reference implementation of the Context Kaizen framework for agentic UX practice: personas, skills, and slash commands for specification, divergent generation, verification against Critical User Journeys, and memory that compounds across cycles.

entry.title: developer-skills
entry.content: Unattended PRD delivery pipeline: /developer loops over a PRD's sub-issues with dispatcher → code-author → diff-reviewer workers, review→fix cycles, and auto-merge.

entry.title: agentcomm
entry.content: Multi-agent mailbox CLI — any git remote is a bus (git+ssh/github/sqlite/s3/gcs/postgres). register/send/inbox/wait/claim/log/channels so Claude coordinates with other agents or sessions; auto-selects the repo bus inside a git repo.

entry.title: dabimas-skills
entry.content: dabimas-skills — a plugin for Claude Code

entry.title: svelte-arch
entry.content: SvelteKit × FSD 2.1 아키텍처 어드바이저 + 프로젝트 주입 킷 (계층·slice·segment + .view/.container 오버레이 · 서버 remote→service→repository(port 인터페이스) · 실행형 매니페스트 · 55룰 감사(steiger 흡수) · FSD 이행 plan)

entry.title: appscope
entry.content: Honest, self-hosted app market intelligence as a Claude Code skill. Collects store rankings, metadata, install buckets, and reviews locally; produces confidence-banded download/revenue estimates (never fabricated, never above MEDIUM); renders an app-intel report. Opt-in federation of public calibration anchors.

entry.title: pandastack
entry.content: Personal AI operator OS for Claude Code. Skill-only (no agents, no commands), 19 skills organized into engineering / productivity / writing / meta buckets under skills/, tiered via manifest.toml. Covers dev / writing / knowledge lifecycles with a review-and-ship learning loop, plus a skill-construction quality loop (writing-great-skills + skill-eval).

entry.title: atl
entry.content: Mirror, edit, validate, and push Confluence pages and Jira issues with the atl CLI

entry.title: clawness
entry.content: A Claude Code plugin that puts the right coding rules in context on every prompt, automatically. 119 rules across 18 domains, per-prompt rule injection (BM25 + TF-IDF + RRF + concept expansion, pure Python), a per-codebase lessons-learned memory injected every turn, Bash-output compression, adversarial review sub-agents, slash commands, a default-on (opt-out) plan-approval gate, and session security hardening (an access guard that forces a prompt on likely exfiltration/destructive tool calls, and a trust ledger that flags changed skills/agents). No Docker, no services, no ML models. Requires Python 3.10+ on PATH; on first session a background hook installs PyYAML (the only dependency) into your environment.

entry.title: baz
entry.content: Baz codebase exploration — indexed search across your org's repos via MCP.

entry.title: skill-concierge
entry.content: A skill-governance layer over Claude Code's default mechanism: semantic retrieval (which skill) + use-enforcement (whether Claude uses one) + a compounding invocation ledger.

entry.title: mobile-app-config
entry.content: Configure mobile app projects and convert Figma or text design tokens into Flutter design-system Dart files from agent workflows.

entry.title: antigravity-awesome-skills
entry.content: Plugin-safe Claude Code distribution of Antigravity Awesome Skills with 1,326 supported skills.

entry.title: craft-workspace-webconsulting-skills
entry.content: craft-workspace-webconsulting-skills — a plugin for Claude Code

entry.title: visualcave
entry.content: Design and render interactive technical diagrams as standalone HTML files or embeddable Astro/MDX components. Supports 11 Mermaid diagram types with dark mode, step-through reveal, hover highlighting, and one-click SVG/PNG/PDF export.

entry.title: second-brain
entry.content: Self-evolving AI second brain. Automatically learns from sessions, discovers tools, maintains a local knowledge base, and self-critiques code quality — getting smarter with every interaction.

entry.title: seldonframe
entry.content: Build, deploy, and sell AI agents for local-service businesses — from your IDE. One command creates a live hosted workspace on *.app.seldonframe.com: website, booking page, intake form, CRM, and an AI receptionist, in about 3 minutes. No signup, no key for your first workspace. Set SELDONFRAME_API_KEY later to unlock more workspaces, custom domains, and marketplace selling.

entry.title: sogni-creative-agent
entry.content: Sogni Creative Agent: image, video, and music generation via Sogni AI's decentralized GPU network. Supports personas, persistent memories, style transfer, and multi-step creative workflows.

entry.title: ultrapowers
entry.content: Autonomous, parallel, worktree-isolated execution of Superpowers plans via a committed Dynamic Workflow. Pairs with superpowers; invoke as /ultrapowers <plan-path> instead of subagent-driven-development.

entry.title: coral
entry.content: Claude Code plugin - structured agents with Codex and Claude CLI bridges, plus deterministic workflow orchestration

entry.title: wix
entry.content: Build, manage, and deploy Wix sites and apps. Includes CLI development skills and Wix MCP server for site management, eCommerce, CMS, dashboard extensions, and more.

entry.title: port-daddy
entry.content: Authoritative port management and multi-agent coordination for local development. Atomic port assignment, pub/sub messaging, distributed locks, and agent registry via CLI, SDK, or HTTP API.

entry.title: starknet-agentic-skills
entry.content: Canonical Starknet skill bundle for AI agents: wallets, DeFi, identity, payments, privacy, and Cairo contract workflows.

entry.title: mnemo-mcp
entry.content: Persistent AI memory — store, search, and recall knowledge across sessions

entry.title: baton
entry.content: Pass the baton. Conduct the fleet. Claude Code as command-and-control for a fleet of coding LLMs — capability routing, cost engine, jobs, decisions, and a knowledge base.

entry.title: ai-review
entry.content: Skills for using ai-review (air) — a desktop code review tool for AI coding agents

entry.title: dividedby-skills
entry.content: dividedby-skills — a plugin for Claude Code

entry.title: versions
entry.content: Go version number parsing, comparison, sorting, grouping, constraint checking, visualization, and file operations — accessible via 13 specialized Claude Code skills, Go SDK, CLI, and MCP Server

entry.title: rmq-vertical-scaler
entry.content: Helps operators configure, deploy, troubleshoot, and upgrade the RabbitMQ Vertical Scaler on Kubernetes. Provides skills that interview you about your workload, generate manifests, and diagnose why scaling isn't happening.

entry.title: sweeper
entry.content: Agent-powered code maintenance with parallel sub-agents, VM isolation, and telemetry-driven learning

entry.title: code-quality-atlas
entry.content: A research-derived suite of 34 code-review and maintenance skills covering correctness, readability, structure, security, performance, tests, migrations, accessibility, observability, LLM and agentic/tool-use safety, install/upgrade experience, authored-artifact conventions (e.g. SKILL.md), and repo-wide audits (architecture, dependencies, config, docs, compliance), plus a router that picks the right lenses for a given change or design doc and a synthesizer that merges their findings into one ranked verdict. Each skill is generated from a verified research atlas with provenance, refined examples, and cross-model evals.

entry.title: orchestra
entry.content: Governance-first specialist skill framework for routed, auditable AI coding workflows.

entry.title: unknowns
entry.content: Skills for discovering and closing knowledge gaps across the dev lifecycle, from Thariq's 'Know Your Unknowns'

entry.title: pywebview-mcp
entry.content: Playwright-style MCP server for pywebview apps — lets Claude see, control, and debug your Python desktop web UI without modifying your app's source code.

entry.title: pr-skill
entry.content: PR description generator skill for personal use

entry.title: html-unknowns-workflow
entry.content: Generate HTML artifacts that expose unknowns before, during, and after implementation work.

entry.title: switcharoo
entry.content: Model-tier routing for Claude Code Max users: pushes delegable subtasks to the cheapest capable model via pinned subagents, stretching your usage limits.

entry.title: seo-kit
entry.content: Real-data SEO + GEO (LLM answer-engine citation) audit toolkit: point it at a URL for a prioritized punch list; free Tier-0 core, paid tiers opt-in.

entry.title: ai-assistant
entry.content: 커스텀 Claude skills & commands 모음

entry.title: pdftomarkdown
entry.content: Lets Claude read any PDF — scanned documents, tables, multi-column layouts, CJK — by converting it to markdown with npx pdftomarkdown.

entry.title: kit
entry.content: All-in-one x-mesh toolkit: x-build (project harness), x-op (strategy orchestration), x-agent (agent primitives), x-solver (problem solving)

entry.title: probe
entry.content: Premise validation — challenge assumptions, kill bad ideas early, earn the right to build

entry.title: code_assist
entry.content: Self-contained developer-workflow powerhouse: atomic commits, architectural code review, phase journals, plan/debug/verify/ADR discipline, structure audit + scaffold, release/onboard/refactor, and github/jira/slack/sonar/graph integrations. Backed by a zero-dep Node CLI, deterministic self-tests, dedicated subagents, and session/git-guard hooks.

entry.title: sb
entry.content: Second-brain skill — captures every Claude Code conversation into a project-scoped Obsidian vault. Mines lessons, topics, tasks, kanban, and connections. Holds knowledge handed to it via a generic ingest primitive (the sutra orchestrator feeds it parsed repo artifacts). Self-healing vault-repair + project-linkage maintenance and optional auto lesson-mining. Subcommands under /sb:.

entry.title: maestro-marketing
entry.content: THE single entry point for any marketing task — the master router (marketing-orchestrator) + copywriter, cta-crafter, seo-optimizer.

entry.title: maestro-finance
entry.content: THE single entry point for any finance task — the master router (finance-orchestrator) + financial-modeler, unit-economics, fpna-analyst.

entry.title: op
entry.content: Strategy orchestration — 17 strategies including refine, tournament, chain, review, debate, red-team, brainstorm, distribute, council, socratic, persona, scaffold, compose, decompose, hypothesis, investigate, monitor

entry.title: build
entry.content: Phase-based project harness with requirements gathering, parallel research, plan validation, DAG execution, cost forecasting, and decision memory

entry.title: humble
entry.content: Structured retrospective — reflect on failures together, find root causes, explore alternatives, and grow

entry.title: apple-ui-craft
entry.content: Principal-engineer-grade Apple UI craft for iOS 26. Seven agents, running on the session model (always the strongest available Claude), that design, review, optimize, and craft SwiftUI so it feels like Apple built it -- Liquid Glass, spring animation, intentional haptics, accessibility from birth, SwiftUI performance, and deep platform + cross-platform integration (widgets, Live Activities, App Intents, Apple Intelligence, WebView, watchOS/tvOS/visionOS/CarPlay). Six skills: design-ios (greenfield screen/flow creation), review-ios-ui (HIG + visual + interaction audit), optimize-ios-ui (animation + haptics + performance tuning), craft-ios-ui (full 5-specialist team sweep), audit-accessibility (deep a11y audit), integrate-platform (system-integration audit). Backed by a self-contained reference library across 12 domains (see ARCHITECTURE.md) distilled from an 88-document iOS vault (~103,000 lines), a Context7-verified version-floor registry, GoodMem learnings, and serena navigation. Under ultracode the session model conducts, and Sonnet-5-xhigh executor teams run the scoped grunt stages. Read-only review by default; findings apply only on explicit user approval.

entry.title: dashboard
entry.content: Web dashboard for .xm project state — visualize builds, probes, solvers, reviews, evals, humble lessons, traces, memory

entry.title: typescript-ui
entry.content: TypeScript 6 UI engineering team. Designs, reviews, optimizes, and improves UI code so it looks like a human design team built it — distinctive aesthetic point-of-view, OKLCH color systems, variable typography, motion with spring physics, sub-2.5s LCP, sub-200ms INP, sub-0.1 CLS, and TS6 strict-mode type safety with branded primitives, discriminated unions, and exhaustiveness. Six specialists (design architect, design reviewer, performance engineer, TypeScript engineer, anti-AI auditor, team lead), running on the session model, backed by self-contained references on TS6, Tailwind v4 + OKLCH + APCA, anti-AI-aesthetic patterns, Core Web Vitals, WCAG 2.2 + reduced motion, and component architecture (compound, polymorphic, slot). Four user-invoked skills: typescript-design-ui, typescript-review-ui, typescript-optimize-ui, typescript-improve-ui. Read-only by default; the orchestrator applies findings only on explicit user approval.

entry.title: maestro-bi
entry.content: THE single entry point for any data/BI task — the master router (bi-orchestrator) + sql-analyst, metric-definer, insight-narrator, dashboard-designer.

entry.title: maestro-security
entry.content: THE single entry point for any security task — the authorization-first master router (security-orchestrator) + threat-modeler, secure-code-reviewer, vuln-analyst, remediation-engineer.

entry.title: trace
entry.content: Agent execution tracing — timeline, token/cost tracking, replay, and diff for multi-agent observability

entry.title: eval
entry.content: Agent output quality evaluation — multi-rubric scoring, strategy benchmarking, and A/B prompt experiments

entry.title: thinking
entry.content: Sequential thinking MCP server for structured problem analysis

entry.title: sutra
entry.content: Orchestrator for claude-skills-pack — unifies code_assist, sb, and unabridged behind one bridged command surface. Owns the capability registry, the artifact interchange schema, the cross-plugin recall fusion, and the verify→lesson→recall feedback loop. Members stay fully standalone; sutra makes them cooperate. Backed by a zero-dep Node CLI, deterministic self-tests, and a session hook.

entry.title: filesystem
entry.content: Filesystem MCP server for file operations

entry.title: playwright
entry.content: Playwright MCP server for browser automation

entry.title: maestro-code
entry.content: THE single entry point for any software task — the master router (dev-orchestrator) + code-reviewer, debugger, test-author.

entry.title: keel
entry.content: Keel — an AI fractional-CTO advisor for product builders who don't have a senior technical voice in the room. Eight skills across the founder journey: first-build-scope, feature-decision, tech-evaluation, architecture-review, deep-review (repo-aware four-lens flagship), enterprise-ready, estimate-check, investor-dd-prep — plus a per-project decision ledger (.keel/) that remembers decisions, assumptions, and revisit-triggers across sessions. Grounded in the persona at cto-persona.md; frameworks load on demand via frameworks/INDEX.md; prescribes first-party tools instead of rebuilding them (ecosystem-tools.md).

entry.title: agent
entry.content: Agent primitives and autonomous behaviors — fan-out, delegate, broadcast, research, solve, consensus, swarm for Claude Code native multi-agent orchestration

entry.title: solver
entry.content: Structured problem solving — decompose, iterate, constrain, or auto-pipeline with strategy recommendation

entry.title: review
entry.content: Multi-perspective code review orchestrator — PR diff analysis with severity-rated findings and LGTM verdict

entry.title: memory
entry.content: Cross-session decision and pattern memory — persist learnings, auto-inject relevant context on session start

entry.title: unabridged
entry.content: Force complete, unabridged output — no truncation, no placeholders, no "for brevity". Triggers on phrases like "full file", "complete implementation", "no placeholders", "whole thing", "write it all out", "no skeleton".

entry.title: claude-apd
entry.content: Agent Pipeline Development — enforced multi-agent pipelines with mechanical guardrails

entry.title: polars-backtest
entry.content: Polars backtest extension development helper - backtesting with polars expressions

entry.title: compound-bash
entry.content: Auto-approve compound bash commands when every sub-command matches your allow rules

entry.title: hero-skills
entry.content: AI Hero agent patterns and workflows for consulting and development

entry.title: software-engineer
entry.content: Multi-agent Claude Code plugin that automates the full software development lifecycle — database → backend → frontend → testing → security scan → git commit. Each domain agent keeps its own knowledge base and learns across sessions. Uses the host IDE's models (orchestrator on the main model, mechanical sub-agents on cheaper models); no API keys or local Ollama required.

entry.title: harness-claude
entry.content: Lean full-SDLC Claude Code harness — Discover, Plan, Implement, Verify, Maintain — with a vague-intent discovery entry above /spec, subagent orchestration, memory persistence, a product/UX + system design altitude, benchmark-gated cost/token optimization, guarded long-running agent runs, multi-agent parallel fan-out, a bug-fix fast lane, and a release & feedback loop (deploy + observe) that closes the pipeline.

entry.title: ai-agent-kit
entry.content: Tool-agnostic engineering skills (stacks + cross-cutting concerns) for Claude Code. The skills layer of ai-agent-kit, installable via the plugin marketplace. For full multi-tool setup (Codex + Antigravity + hooks + commands + docs scaffolding) use the install script instead.

entry.title: shipflow
entry.content: ShipFlow for Claude Code: dedicated /shipflow-* commands (loop, status, issues, PRs, releases) plus a natural-language skill. Bundles the renaiss-shipflow CLI (no separate install) and self-updates on use.

entry.title: knowledge-foundry
entry.content: Governed pipeline for building trusted, licensed, versioned, RAG-ready domain corpora, driven by the deterministic kf CLI. Install the CLI with: npm install -g @knowledge-foundry/cli

entry.title: swiss-cheese
entry.content: No single defense layer is perfect — stack enough imperfect ones that the holes never align. This plugin initializes Swiss Cheese defense layers in your repository, runs a token-frugal multi-agent code review from one shared diff, works autonomously in a loop applying the layers, guides you through building custom layers, audits docs/ADRs/review style, and discovers where task knowledge lives (Jira, Redmine, MCP servers).

entry.title: gm-car-ac-revenue-os
entry.content: A free-first AI revenue operating system for GM Car A/C Service: A/C, general servicing, car electricals, competitors, ads, local SEO, WhatsApp sales, fleet outreach, and training growth.

entry.title: pipecat-dev
entry.content: Development workflow skills for contributing to the Pipecat project

entry.title: revenue-skills-marketplace
entry.content: A marketplace-style bundle of revenue skills for offers, sales, ads, campaigns, social media, outreach, and landing pages.

entry.title: claude-code-stint
entry.content: Stint plugin for Claude Code - Track Claude Code CLI and Desktop coding activity in Stint

entry.title: obsidian-tools
entry.content: Obsidian vault CLI skill — vault-native search, create, tasks, daily notes, and properties via the Obsidian CLI
